activities.details: I killed 9 Vindictas, all heavily armoured dragon riders.
I killed 4 Vindictas, all heavily armoured dragon riders.
I killed 2 devastating creatures of Zaros, all named Nex.
I levelled my Herblore skill, I am now level 95.
It looks like I beat that warrior, ranger, mage and monk to it! I've got myself a dramen staff and I can travel to Zanaris whenever I fancy.
I levelled my Necromancy skill, I am now level 115.
I levelled my Slayer skill, I am now level 100.
I killed 22 Giant Arch-Glacors, from the plane of Leng.
I have bought the Rapid Renewal prayer for 38000 dungeoneering tokens.
I finally felt ready to face Rasial in immortal combat and destroyed his physical body. At least he was true to his word, and freed his army of enthralled souls back to Um.
I killed  An ancient threat: Rasial, the First Necromancer.
activities.text: I killed  Rasial, the First Necromancer.

activities.details: I killed  A phantom born from the God Wars: Hermod, the Spirit of War.
activities.text: I killed  Hermod, the Spirit of War.

activities.details: I worked with a former student of Rasial's, the infamous Lord Yudura, and learned about how power can be consolidated from rituals.
activities.text: Quest complete: Remains of the Necrolord

activities.details: I listened to Skaldrun's saga of Moia, the half-Mahjarrat daughter of Lucien, and her descent into Daemonheim.
I listened to Skaldrun's saga of Moia, the half-Mahjarrat daughter of Lucien, and her descent into Daemonheim.
I now have at least 116000000 experience points in the Farming skill.
I killed 5 boss monsters   called:  Har'Lakk the Riftsplitter , a rammernaut , Lexicus Runewright and Stomp in Daemonheim.
activities.text: I killed 5 boss monsters in Daemonheim.

activities.details: I have breached floor 23 of Daemonheim for the first time.
I have breached floor 22 of Daemonheim for the first time.
I have breached floor 21 of Daemonheim for the first time.
